title: Amazon CloudFront Distribution
description: Schema for an Amazon CloudFront distribution resource, representing a CDN distribution that delivers content from origins to edge locations worldwide.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the distribution.

ARN.description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) for the distribution.

Status.description: The current status of the distribution.

LastModifiedTime.description: The date and time the distribution was last modified.

DomainName.description: The CloudFront domain name assigned to the distribution (e.g., d111111abcdef8.cloudfront.net).

CallerReference.description: A unique value that ensures the request cannot be replayed.

Aliases.description: Alternate domain names (CNAMEs) for the distribution.

DefaultRootObject.description: The object returned when a user requests the root URL (e.g., index.html).

Origins.description: The origin servers for the distribution.

DefaultCacheBehavior.description: The default cache behavior for the distribution.

CacheBehaviors.description: Additional cache behaviors for the distribution.

Comment.description: A comment to describe the distribution.

Enabled.description: Whether the distribution is enabled to accept end user requests.

PriceClass.description: The price class that corresponds with the maximum price to pay for CloudFront service.

WebACLId.description: The AWS WAF web ACL to associate with the distribution.

HttpVersion.description: The maximum HTTP version that viewers can use to communicate with CloudFront.

IsIPV6Enabled.description: Whether IPv6 is enabled for the distribution.

Origin.description: An origin server for the distribution.

Id.description: A unique identifier for the origin.

DomainName.description: The domain name for the origin.

OriginPath.description: An optional path to append to the origin domain name for requests.

OriginAccessIdentity.description: The CloudFront origin access identity to associate with the origin.

HTTPPort.description: The HTTP port the custom origin listens on.

HTTPSPort.description: The HTTPS port the custom origin listens on.

OriginProtocolPolicy.description: The origin protocol policy to apply to the origin.

CacheBehavior.description: A cache behavior that specifies how CloudFront handles requests.

PathPattern.description: The URL pattern that specifies which requests to apply the behavior to.

TargetOriginId.description: The ID of the origin to route requests to.

ViewerProtocolPolicy.description: The protocol that viewers can use to access the files.

CachePolicyId.description: The unique identifier of the cache policy attached to the behavior.

Compress.description: Whether CloudFront automatically compresses certain files.
